forum.link_tooltip: {count, plural, one{# person has opened this} other{# people have opened this}}
forum.confirm_external: You're about to leave the forum. Continue?

settings.opt_out_help: Your clicks still go through; we just won't add them to the count.
settings.opt_out_save_failed: Couldn't save your preference. Try again.

post_controls.disable_tracking: Don't count clicks on this post
post_controls.toggle_failed: Couldn't update click tracking for this post.

discussion_stats.title: Click stats: {title}
discussion_stats.empty: No clicks recorded for any link in this discussion yet.

settings.enabled_help: Master switch. When off, no rewriting and no recording.
settings.track_internal_help: Off keeps counts focused on outbound resources.
settings.open_new_window_label: Open links in a new window
settings.open_new_window_help: Tracked links get target="_blank" so the destination opens in a new tab. Off keeps the click in the same tab.
settings.honor_dnt_help: Skip recording when the request carries DNT: 1.
settings.skip_guests_help: Only count clicks from logged-in users. Guest clicks still resolve the redirect but no row is written.
settings.min_display_label: Minimum count to show the badge
settings.min_display_help: Hide the badge below this number.
settings.dedup_window_help: A given user only counts once per link in this window.
settings.retention_help: Daily job purges link_click_events older than this. Set to 0 to keep events forever.
settings.bot_ua_help: One fragment per line. A request whose User-Agent contains any of these substrings (case-insensitive) is treated as a bot. Built-in bot detection always runs; entries here add to it.
settings.tracking_params_label: Extra tracking query params to strip
settings.tracking_params_help: One pattern per line. Stripped from URLs before dedup so utm-tagged variants count toward the same link. Trailing * matches a prefix (e.g. utm_*). Default list already covers utm_*, fbclid, gclid, mc_cid, igshid, _ga and others.
settings.attachment_prefixes_help: URLs on the forum host whose path starts with one of these prefixes are tracked even when internal-link tracking is off. /assets/files/ is built in for Flarum's default uploads disk; add your own when using fof/upload or a custom CDN path.
settings.domain_blocklist_help: Hosts to skip entirely. One per line. Use *.example.com to match every subdomain. Posts referencing these hosts get no badge and clicks aren't recorded.
settings.confirm_external_help: Show a browser confirm dialog when a reader clicks an external link. Off by default.
settings.digest_enabled_help: Every Monday morning, mail every administrator a plain-text summary of the past week's clicks. Off by default.
settings.webhook_enabled_help: Forward every recorded click as JSON POST to an external URL via the queue.
settings.webhook_url_help: Where to send the JSON payload.
settings.webhook_secret_help: When set, the request body is signed with HMAC-SHA256 and the signature is sent in the X-LinkClicks-Signature header in the form sha256=HEX_DIGEST. Receivers verify by recomputing with the same secret.

tags.disable_tracking_label: Disable link click tracking in this tag
tags.disable_tracking_help: Posts in any discussion tagged with this won't have their links tracked. Existing counts are kept.

analytics.title: Click analytics
analytics.empty: No clicks in the selected window.
analytics.drilldown_tooltip: Click to see who clicked this link

clickers.title: Who clicked this link
clickers.empty: No counted clicks for this link.

click_trail.title: {name}'s click trail
click_trail.empty: No counted clicks recorded for this user.

heatmap.title: Click heatmap (last 30 days)
heatmap.lead: Each cell is one hour of one day. Darker = busier.

gdpr.export_description: All recorded link clicks made by this user.
gdpr.anonymize_description: Strip the user_id and ip_address from each link click event for this user.
gdpr.delete_description: Delete every link click event recorded for this user.
